title: Don't do it for the money, do it for the thing that will change people's lives
html:
TL;DR

  • One-line October 2019 aphorism: Don't do it for the money, do it for the thing that will change the [most] people's lives.
  • Earliest crisp articulation of the impact-over-money founder-instinct that recurs across the corpus, including the November 2019 "improving the human condition — what is the human condition" and the December 2024 departing China amazing life check.
  • The line completes the October-November 2019 aphorism cluster — conformity is shitty (Oct 4) → Gates books as cope (Oct 12) → change-lives over money (Oct 30) → react well to whatever (Nov 9).
  • Functionally the founder-thesis pre-fragment — by 2024-2026 (rankett, outpace, swipr, brotein) Yahir is shipping products explicitly framed as change-lives products, not money-printing products.
  • Pairs with Mr. Phillips Walmart/Costco/Disney aphorisms — the same brain holds compound-your-shit (money) and do-it-for-changing-lives (impact) at once, deferring resolution of the tension.

Notes

The note is a single sentence and a clear position. "Don't do it for the money, do it for the thing that will change the [most] people's lives" — the trailing list in the source is a transcription artifact (likely most truncated mid-typing). Either way the structure is canonical: money is the wrong objective; impact-at-scale is the right one.

This is the founder-frame crystalized at age 17. By 2023 it's AGM startup-advice notes saying the same thing in adult vocabulary. By 2024 it's the 6 month adventure manifesto saying "this life is probably an illusion" and choosing the bet anyway. By 2026 it's the letter to Emily: "I want to build things that matter." The continuity is the same line, dressed differently.

The October-November 2019 cluster is when Yahir is literally drafting the manifesto-fragments that he'll quote back to himself for the next seven years. Each one is one sentence, sealed, dated. They're not aphorisms-borrowed — they're aphorisms-coined.

Privacy note

None.

Connections

  • 2019 10 04 everyone does as told · 2019 10 12 bill gates books cope · 2019 11 09 it doesnt matter react — fall-2019 cluster
  • 2019 03 14 mr phillips substitute — the money-side counterweight
  • 2019 11 13 coding zeal — "improving the human condition" full version
  • · max effort commit · mom house by the river
  • · antonio garcia martinez · chamath palihapitiya
  • grants pass teen era
